## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this change and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] CI / build

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commits used in commit messages.
- [ ] One logical change per commit.
- [ ] No AI attribution in commits or PR description.
- [ ] No emoji in code, comments, commits, or PR text.
- [ ] `rubocop` is clean.
- [ ] Tests added or updated for new logic.
- [ ] `bundle exec rake redmine:plugins:test NAME=redmine_kalvad_slack` passes
      locally (state explicitly if you could not run it).
- [ ] `README.md`, locales, and `CHANGELOG.md` updated where relevant.
